summary: Recording of a DHS podium event announcing the reopening of ICE's VOICE office, with Secretary Noem and victims' family members holding framed photos of relatives killed by aliens, intercut with seated interview testimonials from those families. It is a sober, talking-driven press/testimonial piece, not a music-driven spectacle, so it does not fit youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement; 855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423); *Voice of Patricia Quets, mother of Nicholas Quets; U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal
